case_title: CARFAX INC., A CORPORATION VS. JOSE'S TOWING LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARFAX INC., A CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOSE'S TOWING LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA BAY AUTOSALES; $9,119.50 PRINCIPAL, $1,250.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $431.04 INTEREST, $295.10 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,095.64, SEE SCANNED DOC
